description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and on pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build multiple packages (managarm-kernel and managarm-system) on an ubuntu-20.04 environment. For each package, install prerequisites, check for a requested bootstrap-managarm PR, checkout the Managarm repository, download a rootfs, prepare the build environment, build the package using xbstrap, generate an image, and test the package.
